3.content:
# Host Units

* Read more about Host Units [here](https://www.dynatrace.com/support/help/shortlink/application-and-infrastructure-host-units)

## Full Stack Monitoring (RUM)

* Hosts with monitoring visibility from the Application layer to individual transactions
* 1 Host Unit per 16 GB


## Infrastructure Only

* Hosts with only Host and Process level monitoring
* 0.3 Host Units per 16 GB
* Caps at 1 Host Unit for 64 GB
